hero_description: Master the ancient art of Mehendi (Henna) and turn it into a profitable career. This foundation course teaches you professional mehendi design, application techniques, and business skills to work at weddings, events, and beauty salons across India. Learn from industry experts and build a client base from day one.
overview_description: This comprehensive 8-week program covers everything from henna paste preparation and basic design patterns to advanced bridal mehendi, quick designs for corporate events, and business management. You will gain hands-on experience with real clients, learn about different regional mehendi styles, and develop the skills to earn ₹15,000-50,000+ per month as a professional mehendi artist.

modules.title: Introduction to Mehendi Art & Industry Overview
topics: History and cultural significance of mehendi in India — Understanding mehendi's role in Indian weddings and festivals across regions
Types of mehendi (natural, herbal, chemical-based) — Composition, quality differences, and how to choose the best
Indian mehendi market trends and opportunities — Current demand in weddings, events, salons, and online services
Career opportunities in mehendi art — Employment in salons, event management, freelancing, and starting own business
Safety and hygiene standards — FSSAI guidelines for henna products, allergy testing, and client safety protocols
Tools and equipment overview — Introduction to cones, applicators, stencils, and workspace setup
Client communication basics — Understanding client expectations, taking bookings, and managing appointments
Introduction to business fundamentals — Pricing strategies, cost calculation, and profit margins in mehendi business

modules.title: Henna Paste Preparation & Product Knowledge
topics: Henna plant and extraction process — Where henna grows, harvesting, drying, and powder quality assessment
Natural henna paste preparation from scratch — Step-by-step recipe using henna powder, oils, lemon juice, and additives
Chemical composition and stain development — Understanding PPD (para-phenylenediamine), dye molecules, and color intensity
Paste consistency and texture management — Achieving perfect thickness for smooth application without breaking
Storage and shelf-life management — Proper storage conditions, preventing paste degradation, and freshness indicators
Quality testing and color prediction — Testing henna on skin patch, predicting final color shade, and managing client expectations
Additives and enhancers — Use of eucalyptus oil, lemon juice, sugar, gum arabic for better stain and durability
Troubleshooting common paste problems — Fixing too thick, too thin, low stain, or uneven color issues
Allergies and patch testing protocol — Identifying allergic reactions, performing 24-hour patch tests, and maintaining safety records
Comparing commercial vs. homemade paste — Cost analysis, quality differences, and when to use each type

modules.title: Basic Mehendi Design Patterns & Techniques
topics: Fundamental design elements — Dots, lines, curves, flowers, leaves, and how to combine them into patterns
Regional mehendi styles — Rajasthani (bold, geometric), Gujarati (intricate), Marathi, Bengali, and South Indian styles
Hand mapping and space planning — Understanding hand anatomy, dividing space proportionally, and balancing designs
Cone holding and grip techniques — Proper hand position, wrist movement, and pressure control for consistent lines
Basic floral patterns — Rose, lotus, jasmine, and how to create them with simple strokes
Geometric and abstract designs — Creating borders, fillings, and modern patterns for contemporary clients
Finger and palm designs — Special techniques for highlighting fingers, creating focal points on palm
Practice exercises on paper and synthetic skin — Building muscle memory before working on actual clients
Speed and efficiency drills — Completing designs within time limits (15-30 minutes for quick designs)
Design sketching and planning — Drawing designs on hand with pencil before applying henna
Creating personal design portfolio — Documenting your best work for client reference and social media
Adapting designs for different hand sizes and skin types — Scaling patterns and adjusting for individual client needs

modules.title: Bridal & Occasion Mehendi Specialization
topics: Bridal mehendi design standards — Understanding bride's expectations, creating elaborate full-hand designs, and incorporating groom's name
Full-hand coverage techniques — Working from wrist to fingertips, creating continuous flow, and filling empty spaces
Advanced floral compositions — Creating realistic flowers, shading effects, and three-dimensional appearance
Peacock and bird motifs — Drawing peacocks, parrots, and other birds which are popular in bridal mehendi
Groom's name incorporation — Creatively hiding initials or full name within design patterns
Foot and leg mehendi — Designing for ankles, feet, and extending to calves for complete bridal look
Back-hand and arm extension — Creating seamless flow from hand to forearm and upper arm
Bridal mehendi timing and aftercare — Understanding stain darkening process (24-48 hours) and advising clients on care
Festival mehendi designs — Specific patterns for Diwali, Eid, Karwa Chauth, and other occasions
Quick mehendi for office events — Corporate mehendi designs that are professional yet festive (15-20 minutes)
Kids' mehendi designs — Child-friendly patterns, smaller sizes, and faster application
Mehendi for different age groups — Adapting designs for teenagers, young women, and older clients

modules.title: Client Management, Hygiene & Professional Practice
topics: Client consultation process — Taking detailed notes, understanding preferences, discussing budget and timeline
Workspace setup and sanitation — Organizing tools, maintaining cleanliness, preventing cross-contamination
Personal hygiene and appearance standards — Dress code, hand washing, nail care, and maintaining professional image
Infection control and sterilization — Sterilizing cones, applicators, and reusable tools using proper methods
Handling difficult clients and complaints — Managing expectations, resolving issues, and maintaining relationships
Documentation and record-keeping — Maintaining client information, design preferences, and allergy records
Pricing models and negotiation — Per-hand pricing, hourly rates, package deals, and seasonal pricing
Time management during events — Managing multiple clients, prioritizing work, and meeting deadlines
Creating contracts and agreements — Simple booking forms, cancellation policies, and payment terms
Building client loyalty and repeat business — Follow-up communication, referral programs, and loyalty discounts
Professional conduct and ethics — Respecting client privacy, maintaining confidentiality, and professional behavior
Health and safety compliance — Following local health department regulations and maintaining certification

modules.title: Business Setup, Marketing & Career Development
topics: Starting your mehendi business — Registration, licensing, GST compliance, and legal requirements in India
Salon vs. freelance vs. home-based business — Comparing models, pros-cons, and startup costs for each
Initial investment and cost analysis — Tools, materials, workspace setup, and break-even calculation
Pricing strategy and profit margins — Understanding costs, setting competitive prices, and maximizing earnings
Social media marketing for mehendi artists — Instagram, Facebook, YouTube strategies, posting mehendi photos and videos
Building portfolio and before-after documentation — Professional photography, video testimonials, and client galleries
Online booking systems and payment methods — Using WhatsApp, Google Calendar, online payment apps like PayTM and PhonePe
Networking and referral generation — Building relationships with wedding planners, photographers, and other vendors
Wedding season strategy and planning — Preparing for peak seasons (Oct-Dec, Apr-May), bulk bookings, and team management
Scaling your business — Hiring assistants, training others, and expanding to multiple locations
Continuous learning and skill upgradation — Attending workshops, learning new designs, and staying updated with trends
Financial management and record-keeping — Maintaining income-expense records, tax filing, and business planning

assessment.theory_description: Written exam covering henna composition, design principles, safety protocols, business fundamentals, and industry knowledge
assessment.practical_format: Live mehendi application demonstration on real client or practice hand

practical_items.title: Basic Hand Mehendi Design
practical_items.description: Complete mehendi design on one hand with proper spacing, clean lines, and appropriate coverage in 30 minutes

practical_items.title: Advanced Bridal Design
practical_items.description: Full bridal mehendi design on both hands with groom's name incorporation, floral elements, and artistic details in 60 minutes

practical_items.title: Henna Paste Preparation & Quality
practical_items.description: Prepare natural henna paste from scratch, demonstrate proper consistency, perform patch test, and explain composition

assessment.passing_criteria: Minimum 50 marks (50%) required to pass. Theory minimum 25/50 and Practical minimum 25/50 mandatory.

eligibility: Minimum age: 14 years (parental consent required if below 18)
Minimum education: Class 8th pass or equivalent
No prior experience needed - open to all candidates
Already working as mehendi artist? Apply for RPL (Recognition of Prior Learning) exam
Valid ID proof required at registration (Aadhar, PAN, Voter ID, or Passport)
Applicable for all candidates regardless of gender, caste, or religion
Medical fitness certificate recommended (no serious hand injuries or skin conditions)
Willingness to work with natural and chemical products
learning_outcomes: Prepare high-quality natural and commercial henna paste with proper consistency and stain properties
Design and apply professional mehendi patterns for various occasions including bridal, festival, and corporate events
Demonstrate proper hygiene, sterilization, and safety protocols to protect client health
Manage client relationships, handle consultations, and deliver services meeting client expectations
Establish and operate a profitable mehendi business with proper pricing, documentation, and financial management
Use digital tools and social media to market services, build client base, and scale business

career_paths.title: Professional Mehendi Artist (Freelance)
career_paths.description: Work independently at weddings, festivals, and events. Flexibility to choose clients and set rates.

career_paths.title: Salon Mehendi Specialist
career_paths.description: Work at beauty salons, spas, or unisex parlors with fixed salary plus commission on bookings.

career_paths.title: Mehendi Business Owner
career_paths.description: Own mehendi studio or chain, hire artists, manage multiple bookings, and build brand presence.

career_paths.title: Event Management Mehendi Artist
career_paths.description: Work with wedding planners, event management companies, and organize mehendi ceremonies.

career_paths.title: Bridal Mehendi Specialist
career_paths.description: Specialize in high-end bridal mehendi with premium pricing during wedding seasons.

career_paths.title: Online Mehendi Training Instructor
career_paths.description: Create online courses, YouTube tutorials, and conduct virtual workshops to teach mehendi art.

career_paths.title: Mehendi Product Supplier
career_paths.description: Manufacture and supply henna paste, cones, and tools to other artists and salons.

career_paths.title: Mehendi Designer & Consultant
career_paths.description: Create custom designs, provide consultations, and collaborate with photographers and wedding planners.

certification_details.certificate_issued_by: CETCF (Council for Education, Training & Certification Foundation)
certification_details.certificate_recognition: Nationally recognized in India for employment and business purposes
certification_details.certificate_includes: Course completion, assessment scores, learning outcomes achieved, and validity period

course_highlights: Hands-on training with real clients and practice models
Learn both traditional and modern mehendi design styles
Complete business setup guidance for self-employment
Digital marketing and social media strategies included
Lifetime access to design templates and reference materials
Job placement assistance through partner salons and event companies
Flexible schedule - weekend and evening batches available
Small batch sizes (max 10 students) for personalized attention
Free henna paste and materials provided during course
Industry-expert instructors with 5+ years of professional experience

teaching_methods: Video tutorials and design reference materials
Real client engagement and portfolio building
Business case studies and success stories

materials_provided: Course manual and design reference book
Safety and hygiene kit (gloves, sanitizer, etc.)

industry_connections.partner_salons: Access to internship opportunities at 20+ beauty salons across major cities
industry_connections.wedding_planners: Referral network with event management companies for regular bookings
industry_connections.online_platforms: Support in registering on platforms like BookMyMehendi, Shaadi.com, and local apps
industry_connections.supplier_network: Wholesale connections for henna paste, cones, and materials at discounted rates

success_metrics.business_startup_rate: 40%+ of graduates start own mehendi business within 6 months
success_metrics.client_satisfaction: 4.8/5 average rating from trained artists' clients
